description: Convergence backlog (2026-05-25, post-merge). bl-001 (CLAUDE.md/README) and bl-002 (preferredProvider hint) SHIPPED via merged PRs #172/#171. This single small, genuine-pending item validates the loop end-to-end after the #2 retry-routing fix: runtime-modes.md docs (the deferred PR #170 content). Specified to pass the gate clean — aiming for the first fully-green cycle. Original 12-item roadmap parked in .agentforge/product-roadmap.json.
northStar: One unforked, runtime-agnostic AgentForge (Claude + Codex, best provider x model x effort per job) whose autonomous loop reliably ships, then builds AgentForge Cloud.

items.title: Document Claude+Codex runtime transports in docs/runtime-modes.md
items.description: Docs-only; do NOT change code. Update docs/runtime-modes.md to document the four execution transports (anthropic-sdk, claude-code-compat/cli, codex-cli, openai-sdk) and the AGENTFORGE_RUNTIME values (auto, sdk, cli, codex-cli, openai-sdk) and how each resolves. CRITICAL for internal consistency (a prior gate rejected on exactly this): the resolveMode() code-sample inline comment MUST list ALL valid modes — 'auto' | 'sdk' | 'anthropic-sdk' | 'cli' | 'claude-cli' | 'claude-code-compat' | 'codex-cli' | 'openai-sdk' — matching the modes table elsewhere in the document; do NOT leave it as only 'auto' | 'sdk' | 'cli'. Describe what packages/core/src/runtime actually does today. Add or adjust a doc-truth assertion in tests/docs/claude-md.test.ts if helpful, and self-verify (corepack pnpm exec vitest run tests/docs/claude-md.test.ts) before finishing.
